sections.paragraph: m. id. Isa 3:1, מַשְׁעֵן וּמַשְׁעֵנָה “support of every kind,” e.g. as it is said a little after, of food and drink (compare סָעַד), verse also the chief persons of a nation, on whom they lean, verses , (compare פִּנָּה). As to the use of the masculine and feminine form, joined together, see my Comment. on Isa. loc. cit.
